latest.title: Rebel Catholics Defy Vatican’s Calls to Return to Mainstream Church
latest.summary: The Vatican has excommunicated the priesthood of a rebel Catholic faction. Many of the priests’ followers have refused to renounce them.
latest.details: The Vatican has excommunicated the priesthood of a rebel Catholic faction. Many of the priests’ followers have refused to renounce them.

latest.title: I’ve worked with over 5,000 kids: I swear by this No. 1 parenting rule—it’s ‘surprisingly…
latest.summary: Child development expert Siggie Cohen, who has worked with over 5,000 families, shares one communication mistake she sees parents make every day.
latest.details: Child development expert Siggie Cohen, who has worked with over 5,000 families, shares one communication mistake she sees parents make every day. Here's why she says it can backfire, when to set clear boundaries and how to use questions more effectively.

radar.title: Impeachment Trial of Philippine Vice President Set to Begin
radar.summary: Sara Duterte, who has said she would run for president, could be barred from politics over allegations of corruption and for making death threats…
radar.details: Sara Duterte, who has said she would run for president, could be barred from politics over allegations of corruption and for making death threats against President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.

radar.title: As Xi Looks to Extend His Rule, He Leans on a Longtime Ally
radar.summary: Xi Jinping is preparing to extend his rule as China’s leader and bring fresh blood into the Communist Party elite.
radar.details: Xi Jinping is preparing to extend his rule as China’s leader and bring fresh blood into the Communist Party elite. Cai Qi is the man he’s tasking to help.

radar.title: Founder of prominent underground church released from prison in China
radar.summary: Ezra Jin, founder of Zion Church, lands in the US and reunites with family who are ‘overwhelmed with joy’ The founder of one of China’s most…
radar.details: Ezra Jin, founder of Zion Church, lands in the US and reunites with family who are ‘overwhelmed with joy’ The founder of one of China’s most prominent underground churches has been released from prison and reunited with his family in the United States. Ezra Jin, the founder of Zion Church, landed in the US on Friday evening. He was one of dozens of church members who were detained in a sweeping crackdown on Christians in October .
